last_comments: Defined the G1-03 red spec without shipping the hard-error behavior yet. Added pending red-spec tests for three target contracts: DX005 unpaired marker drift becomes blocking, DX027 raw controller form parsing becomes blocking, and DX020 module-isolation violations stop being suppressible through the temporary allowlist. Synced the roadmap/risk docs to capture that exact scope. Verification: `go test ./tools/cli/ship/internal/policies`; `docket validate TKT-259`; `docket validate TKT-196`.
